title: Diario Tamil
overview: Dario, Zoe and Asia form a united, open and polygamous family. Asia was in India in her youth, and she has convinced Zoe and Darío to travel to that country together, as was once done on the well-known hippie trail. Each character will find a reason for being in this initiative journey.
